title: NUPTIO Round Mirror Plate Centrepieces 20cm: 6 Pcs Glass Candle Plates 2mm Table Mirrors Wedding Centrepiece Mirrored Candle Tray Set Small for Event Diy Crafts Project Home Decor
features: 【2 mm Dicker Spiegel】 The parcel contains six 2mm-thick mirror trays. Please note: the product is lightweight. Crafted from high-quality glass, NUPTIO round mirror wedding centerpieces for tables feature a crystal clear mirror surface, nicely finished back, and beveled edges.

【3 Sizes Available】 Choose from three different sizes of NUPTIO round mirror plates: large (7.87 inches/30cm), medium (9.84 inches/25cm), and small (11.81 inches/20cm). Please select the appropriate size according to your requirements. Note: candles not included.

【Versatile Uses】 Add a touch of sparkle to your centerpiece with NUPTIO candle holders for pillar candles. These mirror wedding centerpiece for table not only reflect candlelight beautifully, but they can also be used for various other purposes. Decorate your home with vases, candle holders, flowers, fairy lights, or wall decorations.

【Wide Applications】 Make your event stand out with NUPTIO mirror centerpieces for tables. These round mirror trays seamlessly blend into any setting or occasion. They are perfect for weddings, events, table settings, DIY arts and crafts projects, and adding flair to home decor.

【Secure Packaging】 Each mirror tray candle holder is carefully packed with custom styrofoam and bubble wrap to ensure safe transportation. The durable carton exterior provides additional protection. If any of the mirror plates for centerpiece are cracked, please contact us.
